category_sources: source_facts.description says it makes syntactically valid but semantically spec-noncompliant videos; official README describes analyzing, generating, and manipulating such H.264 files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses H26Forge; source_facts.name provides h26forge.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to getting-started and editing documentation under the repository docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/h26forge/h26forge; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify H.264 video generation/manipulation for syntactically valid but semantically noncompliant files; official repository metadata identifies Rust implementation.
